mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, unit_id, attendance_date, patch_type, patch_time, reason, status, approve_user_id, approve_time, approve_comment, create_time, update_time, valid_flag FROM attendance_patch_apply WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT a.id, a.user_id, a.unit_id, a.attendance_date, a.patch_type, a.patch_time, a.reason, a.status, a.approve_user_id, a.approve_time, a.approve_comment, a.create_time, a.update_time, a.valid_flag, u.username, u.real_name, su.unit_name, au.username AS approve_username, au.real_name AS approve_real_name FROM attendance_patch_apply a INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = a.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_org_unit su ON su.id = a.unit_id LEFT JOIN sys_user au ON au.id = a.approve_user_id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance_patch_apply SET status = #{status}, approve_user_id = #{approveUserId}, approve_time = #{approveTime}, approve_comment = #{approveComment}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
